hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
session_id = data.get('session_id', '')
projects_dir = os.path.expanduser(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR', os.path.expanduser('~/.claude-internal')) + '/projects')
import glob
matches = glob.glob(os.path.join(projects_dir, '**', session_id + '.jsonl'), recursive=True)
prompt = '任务完成'
if matches:
    for line in reversed(open(matches[0]).readlines()):
        try:
            d = json.loads(line)
            if d.get('type') == 'user':
                c = d.get('message', {}).get('content', '')
                if isinstance(c, str) and '<' not in c and len(c.strip()) > 2:
                    prompt = c.strip()[:80]
                    break
        except: pass
subprocess.run(['osascript', '-e', f'display notification \"{prompt}\" with title \"Claude Code 完成 ✅\" sound name \"Glass\"'])
subprocess.run(['cmux', 'notify', '--title', 'Claude Code 完成 ✅', '--body', prompt])
subprocess.Popen(['say', '-v', 'Meijia', '-r', '170', f'任务完成：{prompt}'])
" 2>/dev/null || true
